form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation won by 0.8 len Naas October 11 over 1609m defeating Handani with 58kg at $1.80. When resuming last campaign third of 10 at Punchestown September 16 over 1609m, 0.8 len behind Port Of Spain with 59kg at $8. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Listowel September 23 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 8 len behind Limestone carrying 61kg at $6. On debut second of 10 at Curragh April 12 over 1207m, 3 len behind Green Sense with 60.5kg at $4.30. Has ability and worth following.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Not seen since winning by nose Gowran Park October 20 over 1709m on heavy track defeating Sanctijude carrying 56.5kg at $5. On debut fourth of 9 at Listowel September 22 over 1609m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Cherry Hill Girl carrying 58.5kg at $13. Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 7th of 13 at Naas on March 22 over 1408m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Causeway with 58kg at $15. Previously second-up second last of 7 at Galway on September 9 over 1408m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Zous And Me with 55kg at $2.50. Fitter but hard to see her featuring.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation third of 11 at Naas October 12 over 1408m, 2 len behind Alphecca carrying 57.5kg at $4.60. form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Naas October 12 over 1408m, 6 len behind Alphecca with 61kg at $81. On debut fourth of 9 at this track August 7 over 1609m, 8 len behind Montreal with 59.5kg at $19. Not keen this time.
